nodes.name: Banded wattle-eye
nodes.summary: Banded wattle-eye（Banded wattle-eye，学名 Platysteira laticincta），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: |date=January 2019 |title=Occupancy and Conservation Prospects of Endemic Banded Wattle-Eye Platysteira laticincta in the Kilum–Ijim Community Forest, Northwestern Cameroon |journal=Tropical Conservation Science |volume=12 |page=194008291988288 |doi=10.1177/1940082919882884 |issn=1940-0829|doi-access=free }} It is threatened by habitat loss
